payload.answer: This looks like a new learning interest rather than a conflict with existing memory. I can offer choices for how to handle it, but I won’t save or update anything unless you choose an option.
repair_options: Remember this as a new learning interest: “I want to learn more about knowledge graphs.”
Do not remember this; just treat it as a one-time request.
Ask a follow-up to clarify what aspect of knowledge graphs you want to learn about, such as fundamentals, use cases, RDF/SPARQL, graph databases, or AI applications.
